task.title: How to use the Provider Response Activity Report to find specific information?
Does CDSs require significant follow-up to bring closure to a query?

step.cmd: Select Program Management from the Analytics screen.
Select the Provider Response Activity tab.
step.stepresult: The report displays data for last one calendar month based on the discharge date.

step.cmd: Select the time range from the Discharge Date range filter.
Analyze Total row: Total Sent Clarifications in the selected date range, Total No. of times sent in the selected date range, Avg. No. of times sent.
Analyze Total Sent Clarifications, Total No. of times sent, Avg. No. of times sent for each provider.
Identify the provider with max Avg. No. of Times Sent.

info.note: CDSs had to do a lot of follow-ups with this provider. Similarly, identify top worst performing providers based on Avg. No. of Times Sent.

step.cmd: Click on the value of Avg. No. of times Sent’, and analyze encounter and clarification details for the clarifications sent to the provider.

task.title: Which providers are not responding to the clarifications sent by the CDS team?

step.cmd: Select Program Management from the Analytics screen.
Select the Provider Response Activity tab.
step.stepresult: The report displays data for last one calendar month based on the discharge date.

step.cmd: Select the time range from the Discharge Date range filter.
step.stepresult: This chart displays clarification distribution by Response type.

step.cmd: Identify the provider with highest count of No Response clarification. Use tool-tip to view the percentage of Not responded clarification.
Click on No Response section/area for that provider to view the Encounter Details and Clarification Details tabular report.

Alternatively, analyze No Response Clari column and No Response Rate columns in Clarification and Response Summary by provider to identify total No Responses clarifications and provider with highest No Response Clarifications.

task.title: Is the CDS team sending inaccurate clarifications to the providers, resulting in lot of Not Agreed clarifications?

step.cmd: Select Program Management from the Analytics screen.
Select the Provider Response Activity tab.
step.stepresult: The report displays data for last one calendar month based on the discharge date.

step.cmd: Select the time range from the Discharge Date range filter.
Analyze Not Agreed Clari column in the Clarification and Response Summary by Provider tabular report.
step.stepresult: This column displays total Not Agreed Clari. and the count of Not Agreed Claris for each Provider.

step.cmd: Click on the total for Not Agreed Clari, Encounter and Clarification Details tabular report now shows details of Not Agreed Claris. Sort this table by CDS. Identify the CDS who has max number of not agreed Claris. Also, view the clarification details- Clari Subject, Clari Type, Sent Date, Response Date, Provider, etc.
Analyze the clarifications at CDE application side and identify if the clarifications were inaccurate, o, identify the reason behind non-agreement by the physician.

task.title: Who are my bottom and top responders to clarification?

step.cmd: Select Program Management from the Analytics screen.
Select the Provider Response Activity tab.
step.stepresult: The report displays data for last one calendar month based on the discharge date.

step.cmd: Select the time range from the Discharge Date range filter.
step.stepresult: This chart displays count of Sent Clarifications, count of Responses, and Response Rate for each provider.

step.cmd: Identify the provider with highest Response Rate and the provider with lowest Response Rate. Work with physician champions and CDSs to increase the response rate.

task.title: Which diagnosis codes are most frequently resulting in clarifications?

step.cmd: Select Program Management from the Analytics screen.
Select the Provider Response Activity tab.
step.stepresult: The report displays data for last one calendar month based on the discharge date.

step.cmd: Select the time range from the Discharge Date range filter.
Analyze the Clarifications by Clari Subject chart.
step.stepresult:
This chart displays count of clarifications sent for each clarification code and helps you to identify top clarified codes.
Use the Clarifications by Clari Subject chart to analyze the following:
To which providers the maximum number of clarifications were sent for code Congestive Heart Failure. Click on the bar for Congestive Heart Failure and the Clarification and Response Summary by Provider tabular report now displays the data for clarifications sent for Congestive Heart Failure. Use this tabular report to analyze:
How many congestive heart failure clarifications were sent to each provider?
Response rate and agreement rate for these clarifications.
How many Congestive Heart failure clarifications were not agreed?
How many Congestive Heart failure clarifications were not responded?
Which CDSs had sent the maximum number of clarifications for code Congestive Heart Failure? Click on the bar for Congestive Heart Failure and the Encounter and Clarification Details tabular report now displays the encounter and clarification details for Congestive Heart Failure. Sort the table by CDS by clicking on the CDS column headings and identify the CDSs who had sent the clarification for Congestive Heart failure.

task.title: Which providers should I target to improve response TAT?

step.cmd: Select Program Management from the Analytics screen.
Select the Provider Response Activity tab.
step.stepresult: The report displays data for last one calendar month based on the discharge date.

step.cmd: Select the time range from the Discharge Date range filter.
Analyze the Average Response TAT (Hrs) KPI card.
step.stepresult:
The KPI card displays the overall average response TAT at Org level. This KPI card displays overall average response TAT (Hrs) for all the facilities report you have access.
Use the Average Response TAT (Hrs) KPI card to analyze the following:
What is the average response TAT for the clarifications sent by a CDS? To view average response turnaround time for clarifications sent by a CDS, select the CDS name in the CDS filter.

step.cmd: Analyze the Average Response TAT (Hrs) chart.
step.stepresult:
This chart displays average response turnaround time for each provider and helps you to identify the providers with least response turnaround time.
Use the Average Response TAT (Hrs) chart to analyze the following:
What is the average response TAT for the clarifications sent by a CDS? To view average response turnaround time for clarifications sent by a CDS, select the CDS name in the CDS filter.
What is the average response TAT for clarifications sent to Dr. James by a CDS ? Select the CDS name from the CDS filter and the Avg. Response TAT (Hrs.) chart now displays the average response turnaround time for clarifications sent by the CDS.
